name: Truepic
description: Truepic — content authenticity and C2PA provenance API for verifying real vs synthetic media.

seo.title: Truepic — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Truepic: Truepic — content authenticity and C2PA provenance API for verifying real vs synthetic media.

when_to_use: Verifying image authenticity and provenance at point of capture
Building fraud detection for insurance claims with verified media
Certifying photo integrity for legal and compliance workflows
Integrating C2PA content credentials into media pipelines

pros: Useful for insurance, inspection, and media
Backed by serious funding and partners
cons: Provenance is proactive, doesn't fix legacy content
review.verdict: Best bet for provenance-based authenticity, but depends on industry-wide C2PA adoption to pay off fully.
review.best_for: Insurance, claims, media, and regulated flows where capture-time verification matters.
review.not_for: Detecting existing deepfakes in the wild without controlled capture.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
